observations: Coherent professional head-and-shoulders portrait with readable eyes and natural facial structure.
Plain matte gray backdrop holds without panels, bands, strips, or clutter.
No visible ink outlines, contour staining, lineart leakage, harsh edge halos, or output corruption.
The diagnostic map is coherent, but hairstyle and outer silhouette adherence are intentionally loose at the configured low control strength.
notes: This result does not establish exact identity or silhouette preservation.
certified_scope: single bounded 768x768 head-and-shoulders portrait using the lineart_v4 plain-backdrop profile
